name: logfire
description: Add Logfire observability to Python applications with auto-instrumentation for FastAPI, httpx, asyncpg, SQLAlchemy, and more

interface.shortDescription: Investigate telemetry and add Logfire instrumentation.
interface.longDescription: Use Logfire skills and MCP tools to add instrumentation, query traces and logs, investigate production errors, and connect telemetry back to application code.
defaultPrompt: Help me add Logfire instrumentation to this app.
Investigate recent Logfire errors for this service.
Find slow endpoints in Logfire and suggest fixes.
